definitions.text: Possessing beauty, impressing the eye; attractive. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
examples: Anyone who has ever met her thought she was absolutely beautiful.
There's a beautiful lake by the town.

definitions.text: Used emphatically or ironically, after the noun it qualifies.

examples: He was a beautiful person; he would drop everything to help you.
You've done a beautiful thing today.

definitions.text: Someone who is beautiful. Can be used as a term of address.
examples: The man was faithful to his wife, ignoring the many blonde beautifuls who surrounded him wherever he went.
